final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing PPT cover slide for a domestic China fundraising roadshow presentation announcing GPT-5.5, with Sam Altman as the speaker.

Style/medium: needs a high-end Chinese domestic GP/LP roadshow deck aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a 16:9 presentation cover slide layout with title area, speaker name, and event context clearly structured
Subject: must include the GPT-5.5 launch theme and Sam Altman as the named speaker
Scene/backdrop: needs a premium tech-meets-finance backdrop — exact visual treatment is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a confident, authoritative, forward-looking atmosphere — exact light treatment is yours
Color palette: needs a direction aligned with institutional Chinese VC/PE roadshow sensibility — exact palette is yours
Materials/textures: needs a polished, professional surface treatment — exact finish is yours
Text (verbatim): must include "GPT-5.5" (prominent, primary), "奥特曼" (speaker name), and roadshow/融资 context labeling
Constraints: must preserve Chinese domestic roadshow conventions — layout, hierarchy, and tone must read as a legitimate 国内路演 GP-facing deck cover
Avoid: overly casual or consumer-app aesthetics; must not look like a Western Silicon Valley pitch deck
